title: Echoes of the Nether (Structures)
description: Adds 8 New Structures To The nether. ( Vanilla Blocks Only )
body:
![nether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3b8c3f1dd14cc0234d31295ac34a463468b628b.png)

**Echoes of the nether** is a mod that expands the nether with new structures. (Total: 8) 

We also have an end version! check here: [Echoes of The End ( Structures)](https://modrinth.com/mod/echoes-of-the-end-(-structures))

**🏗️ New Nether Structures**

Nether Well – A strange, ancient well lost in the Nether wastes

Nether Dark Temple – A corrupted temple shrouded in darkness

Guard’s House – A small outpost once used to protect Nether settlements

Nether Monster Room – A dangerous room crawling with hostile skeletons

Nether Ruin – Crumbling remains of forgotten buildings

Nether Ship – A mysterious ship trapped in the Nether

Nether Temple – A powerful structure filled with danger and loot

Soul Tower – A haunting tower built to watch the nether

![temple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aec7d7924d53cba610ced46787834e52c5fe7565.png)

![info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a185f02614a2e92c31ceef53db30f8c7c8483b9c.png)

**✨ Features**

Fully generated Nether structures

Fits naturally into the vanilla Nether biome style

Encourages exploration and risk-reward gameplay

Perfect for adventure, exploration, and modpacks& works with modded biomes.

![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcddea89cd8a41a90535c1cd4b04c0100487418d_0.webp)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with: intellij

#AD
